mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.name,
CASE WHEN rr.role_id IS NOT NULL THEN true ELSE false END AS checked
false AS checked
FROM sys_resource r
LEFT JOIN sys_role_resource rr ON rr.resource_id = r.id AND rr.role_id = #{roleId}
ORDER BY r.id
SELECT r.url, r.methods FROM sys_resource r JOIN sys_role_resource rr ON rr.resource_id = r.id JOIN sys_user_role ur on rr.role_id = ur.role_id WhERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT sur.user_id from sys_user_role sur JOIN sys_role_resource srr on sur.role_id = srr.role_id WHERE srr.resource_id = #{resourceId}
